group.name: Stage Kit Inverted
group.description: Negative-space inversions of the Stage Kit cues: most lights are one with animations turning lights off.

cues.name: Cool Automatic
cues.description: Blue field with two dark gaps rotating CW and a green lit accent CCW, on the beat

notes.label: Notes
notes.note:
The Cue Started event only fires once 
when the cue is first triggered.

This is good for initializing any variables you will need.
notes.title: Cue Started Fires Once

notes.label: Notes
notes.note:
Cue Called fires repeatedly while a cue is active. 

If the cue is already running the second call 
will get queued and run when the first ends.
notes.title: Cue Called Fires Repeatedly

notes.label: Info
notes.note:
Data Nodes lets you extract information about the
current setup (number of lights, etc) and the current 
cue (BPM, etc). 

These can then be assigned to Variables where additional
operations are performed.
notes.title: About Data & Math Nodes

notes.label: Notes
notes.note:
Effects are re-usable components that can be shared
between different cues.

They're self-contained effect graphs that you can pass
variables to.
notes.title: About Effects

cues.name: Cool Manual
cues.description: Blue field with two dark gaps rotating CW and a green lit accent CCW, on each keyframe

cues.name: Warm Automatic
cues.description: Red field with two dark gaps rotating CW and a yellow lit accent CCW, on the beat

cues.name: Warm Manual
cues.description: Red field with two dark gaps rotating CW and a yellow lit accent CCW, on each keyframe

cues.name: Score
cues.description: Yellow field with dark gaps stepping in opposite pairs and a blue lit accent stepping CCW

cues.name: Menu
cues.description: Blue field with a dark gap sweeping across

cues.name: Intro
cues.description: Low green field, a green pulse blooms middle-out on the beat, mirrored on front and back

cues.name: Silhouettes
cues.description: Low green field, on each measure the back flashes high while the front drops to black

cues.name: Flare Fast
cues.description: Blue field, a dark gap steps across on the beat - synced front and back

cues.name: Flare Slow
cues.description: White field, a dark gap steps across on the beat right-to-left, synced front and back

cues.name: Harmony
cues.description: Large: amber field with two dark gaps rotating. Small: cyan field with one dark gap rotating

cues.name: Searchlights
cues.description: Yellow field with a dark searchlight gap stepping CCW on the beat. Large venues add a red lit accent on the opposite side

cues.name: Sweep
cues.description: Large: red field with a dark gap sweeping across. Small: yellow field with a dark gap sweeping across

cues.name: Stomp
cues.description: Field cycles yellow -> green -> red on each keyframe, blacking out briefly between colours

cues.name: Default
cues.description: Blue field, each keyframe alternates which half steps dark (outer then inner). drum-red triggers a brief dark blink.

cues.name: Frenzy
cues.description: On each beat the field changes to the next Frenzy colour (large red/blue/yellow, small red/green/blue) and a different third is set dark

cues.name: Dischord
cues.description: Amber field, a dark gap rotates while outer thirds alternate dark, and drum-red triggers a dark blink

cues.name: Silhouettes Spotlight
cues.description: Green field, drum-red triggers a dark blink (a white blink instead when the previous cue was Dischord)
